ActorFrame.InCommand: %function(self) self:linear(.2) self:addx(SCREEN_WIDTH) self:linear(.05) self:skewx(0) self:addx(100) end

Layer.InitCommand: %function(self) self:horizalign('left') self:x(8) self:y(12) self:zoom(0.5) self:settext('Page ' .. math.floor((scoreIndex+3)/4) .. ' / ' .. math.floor((table.getn(AllScores)+3)/4)) end
%function(self) k = scoreIndex scoreIndex = k + 1 table.insert(scoreRow,self) self:y(scoreRowY*(table.getn(scoreRow)-1)) if AllScores[k] then self:playcommand('Set') else self:zoom(0) end end
%function(self) k = scoreIndex scoreIndex = k + 1 table.insert(scoreRow,self) self:y(scoreRowY*(table.getn(scoreRow)-1)) if AllScores[k] then self:playcommand('Set') else self:zoom(0) end end
%function(self) k = scoreIndex scoreIndex = k + 1 table.insert(scoreRow,self) self:y(scoreRowY*(table.getn(scoreRow)-1)) if AllScores[k] then self:playcommand('Set') else self:zoom(0) end end
%function(self) k = scoreIndex scoreIndex = k + 1 table.insert(scoreRow,self) self:y(scoreRowY*(table.getn(scoreRow)-1)) if AllScores[k] then self:playcommand('Set') else self:zoom(0) end end
